reviews.comment:
Es un edificio casi histórico, perteneciente a una institución de una gran trayectoria. Vale la pena ver su colección de automóviles de carrera. Si amas el automovilismo, no te la podés perder

(Translated by Google)
It's a nearly historic building, belonging to a long-established institution. Its collection of racing cars is well worth seeing. If you love motorsports, you can't miss it.
